notes: ALL CAPS always. Used for publication mastheads: THE CLOSING TABLE and FRONT PORCH. The defining typographic voice of GRM. Never use sentence case for display headlines.
Italic script used exclusively for 'The' above publication names. Sets editorial tone. Never use for body content or navigation.
H2 level. Used for editorial section headers: THE STORY, THE MARKET, THE AUDIENCE. All caps. Teal bar treatment optional.
H3 level. Section dividers within a page. Title case acceptable at this level.
Primary body text throughout all GRM materials. Clean and readable at small sizes. UTF-8 encoding required. Never below 10pt in print.
Editorial body text for long-form content. Feature articles, agent profiles, homeowner stories. Pairs with Comfortaa headlines for premium editorial feel.

color: #78AD4E for Front Porch or #52B5CB for GRM/CT
notes: Italic pull quotes. Front Porch uses sage green italic for warmth. Closing Table uses teal italic for authority. Never use em dashes in pull quotes.
Photo captions and footnotes. Slightly lighter gray for visual hierarchy.
Logo left, publication name and page number right. Teal rule line above. Consistent across all pages.
Inside pill badge. ALL CAPS. Letter-spacing 1.5px. Min 8pt clear space below badge before headline starts.
Large feature numbers for market data callouts. Teal color only. Label below at 12pt Nunito Regular in near-black.
Format: Name comma Title comma Location. No dash prefix in GRM style.
Website navigation and UI labels. Title case for nav. All caps for header bar labels with 2px letter-spacing.
Card headlines. All caps optional for Closing Table. Title case for Front Porch cards.

color: #FFFFFF on dark cards or #1A1A1A on light
notes: All card text must be fully visible. Never truncate with ellipsis on printed materials.
